tool_design.role_in_intervention: Monthly owner-facing and inspection-ready summary of cold-chain control.
tool_design.expected_output: Completed monthly report with KPI summary, major risks, and actions

failure_warnings.warning: The report is assembled as a narrative afterthought instead of from current dashboard data.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The summary becomes subjective and stops being reliable evidence.
early_signals: Numbers in the report do not match the workbook
Sections are filled with vague narrative and no actual metrics
prevention: Complete the report directly from T004-01 each month
mitigation: Rebuild the report from source data
Strip it back to facts and actions if narrative quality is low

failure_warnings.warning: The report is filed but not used to make decisions or communicate risk upward.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The team produces a clean monthly pack while the same weak spots persist.
early_signals: The same monthly concern appears repeatedly with no owner shift
Actions from the previous report remain open with no explanation
prevention: Require sign-off and action review inside the report
Carry forward only unresolved actions with a named owner
mitigation: Run a short owner-manager review using the report as the agenda
Escalate repeated unresolved themes into the relevant lower block

content:
# Monthly Cold Chain Management Report **Tool ID:** T004-02 **Block:** B004 (Cold Chain Excellence Dashboard) **Domain:** Food Safety & Hygiene (D01_food_safety) **Level:** L3 **Format:** Template **Role:** Owner / Manager **Time Required:** 15-20 minutes monthly **Version:** 2.0 --- ## What This Tool Is For Use this report to convert the dashboard into a monthly management and evidence pack. It should answer three things clearly: - Did we control the cold chain this month? - Where were the main risks or failures? - What are we doing next? --- ## Report Header | Field | Entry | |---|---| | Venue | | | Reporting month | | | Prepared by | | | Reviewed by | | | Review date | | --- ## 1. Executive Summary **Overall month status:** Green / Amber / Red **One-sentence summary:** __________________________________________________ **Top three points:** 1. ________________________________________________ 2. ________________________________________________ 3. ________________________________________________ --- ## 2. KPI Snapshot | KPI | Target | Actual | Commentary | |---|---|---|---| | Daily temp check completion | `100%` | | | | Delivery acceptance completion | `100%` | | | | Average fridge audit score | `90%+` | | | | Excursion count | `0` | | | | Stock loss from temp failures | `0` | | | --- ## 3. Significant Events This Month | Area | What Happened | Impact | Follow-Up | |---|---|---|---| | Excursions | | | | | Suppliers | | | | | Storage discipline | | | | | Equipment | | | | --- ## 4. Equipment And Investment View | Unit | Current Status | Decision | Reason | |---|---|---|---| | Milk fridge | | Watch / Repair / Replace | | | Prep fridge | | Watch / Repair / Replace | | | Display fridge | | Watch / Repair / Replace | | | Main freezer | | Watch / Repair / Replace | | --- ## 5. Actions For Next Month | Action | Owner | Due Date | Priority | |---|---|---|---| | | | | High / Medium / Low | | | | | High / Medium / Low | | | | | High / Medium / Low | --- ## 6. Evidence Filed
  • Dashboard workbook reviewed
  • Key incident reports filed
  • Supplier issues reviewed
  • Monthly report filed with compliance records
--- ## Connected Resources **Built from:** - T004-01 - Cold Chain Dashboard Workbook - T004-03 - Equipment Health Scorecard & Replacement Trigger - T004-04 - Quarterly Cold Chain Trend Review --- *Tool Version 2.0 - the monthly pack that proves management is paying attention.*
